verses.text: Leenggahzu in mi kamtam sakin khamtheihzu in mi kitawngsak a, zukhamna pen haina ahi hi
Kumpipa' hehna pen a lauhuai mahmah humpinelkai hawk bang hi a, kumpipa a hehsak khate in sihlawh uh hi
Kitot khak ding pelhna in pahtak ngahna hi a, mihaite bek kitot ding ut uh hi
Lo khawh hunin a kho nuamlo thadahpa in tuk anlak hun ciangin bangmah neilo ding hi
Mihingte' ngaihsutna pen a thuk sunga om tui tawh kibang a, thuthuk mu theite bek in suahkhia thei hi
Mi khempeuh pen mi citakin kigen kim uh hi; ahi zongin a citak takpi ding mi kimuzo ding ahi hiam
Mi khat thumanin a hoihin a nuntak leh ama suanlekhakte mi hampha ahi uh hi
Thukhenna tokhom tungah thu khenin a tu kumpipa in a mitin a etna tawh a hoihlote khenkhia thei hi
“Ka lungsim siangtho hi; mawhna ka nei het kei hi,” a ci thei ding mi kua om ahi hiam
Tawisuang nam nih leh piciang nam nih zangin mi khemna pen Topa in a deihlohna kibang hi
Naupangte nangawn mi citak mihoih ahihna a gamtatna panun kimukhia thei hi
Topa in khua muhna ding mit, khua zakna ding bil hong guan hi
Lumlum lecin na zawng ding a, semsem lecin na hau ding hi
Van leipa in van zuakpa kiangah, “Kiman kei, kiman kei,” cici khem a, a paikhiat khit ciangin sumdek siam mahmah ing, ci-in mi kiangah kisial hi
Pilna tawh kam na pau theih leh kham leh suang manpha sangin a manphazaw a nei na hi hi
Mi khat in gamdang mi khat' leiba a lohsak dingin kam a hai ciam leh a ciam bangin a neihsa kilaksak takpi ding hi
A manloin a kingah an pen lim zungzung a, ahi zongin a nung ciangin suangtang haikhak tawh a kibang ahi hi
Hoihtakin geelna tawh nasepna tangtung hi. Geelna kician omlopi-in galsim dingin kipan kei in
Mi a gensia kawikawite in thu im theilo hi. Tua banga mi haipaute tawh kikhawl kei in
Na nu leh na pa na samsiat leh khuamial sunga om meivak kisumit na bang ding hi
A baih lamin hauhpakna pen a tawpna-ah phattuamna omlo hi
Mite' hong bawlsiatna thuk ding ngaihsun kei in la, Topa' hong huh ding ngakzaw in
Tawisuang nam nih a zangte Topa in mudah a, amah in tawikhaina manlote hoih salo hi
Topa in mite' gamtatna zia ding uk hi. Koici gamtat ding cih mihing in bangci theih ding ahi hiam
Pasian' tungah piak ding na ciam ma-in hoihtakin ngaihsun masa in. Tua hi kei leh na kinungsik khading hi
A pil kumpipa in migilote tengkhia a, khasiat loin gim piagawp hi
Topa in mihing lungsim meivak bangin zang a, i sungtawng dongin hong mu tel hi
Kumpipa in thuman, thutang, citakin a uk laiteng a kumpi za-ah kip bek hi
Khangnote' thahatna pen amau' minthan'na hi a, khanghamte' sam kan'na pen amau' thupina lim ahi hi
Nakpi takin satna in misia kimlai a pha hong suah a, nakpi takin vuakna in i sungtawng hoihlohna teng a siangsak hi.
